one_liner: Legacy iStar wind-down at ~54% discount to Q1 book; base ~10.4% per year if ~75% of component NAV realizes in five years.
key_assumptions: SAFE stake marked gross (~$18.5/sh base) with margin loan in senior debt (~−$17.1/sh)
MD&A monetizing bucket $71.4M carrying; Magnolia/Asbury residual ~$153.6M split from overlap
Wind-down fee reserve ~$1.4/sh base from contractual Safehold management schedule
Five-year horizon; asset sales and repurchases, not normalized operating FCF
open_questions: Exact integer SAFE share count undisclosed (~13.525M implied)
Numeric margin LTV / collateral posting triggers not in 10-Q
No asset-level bids for residual Magnolia/Asbury operating real estate
